last_cycle_summary: Final V1 completion report written after orchestrator final validation passed. Aletheia V1 is complete for the local/private-pilot usable target, with caveats preserved: local/private-pilot only, no legal advice, no production SaaS readiness, Supabase source listing unavailable, Supabase runtime persistence unavailable, no public persistV1RuntimeResult route or approval retry wiring, review-derived eval not durable, and external model calls off by default.

architecture_contracts.summary: Shared V1 facade, fixtures, guards, audit/eval/skill helpers, and module boundary docs are complete for local/private-pilot scope.

document_retrieval.summary: Local UI/backend batch import, 24-document retrieval eval, matter-scoped retrieval, V1 source index, needs_ocr, XLSX basic parsing, and compact source preview are validation-ready. Rich spreadsheet semantics, full source page preview, and Supabase source listing remain unavailable.

llm_agent_runtime.summary: Deterministic runtime, one-shot scheduler, local repository-level persistV1RuntimeResult, blocked external-call checkpoint persistence, trace, schema guard, and token estimates exist. Supabase runtime persistence, public route, approval retry wiring, real providers, and exact pricing adapters remain unavailable.

gate_engine.summary: Required gates, external-source audit path, approval payload gate snapshot IDs, and fail-closed final export behavior are complete for local/private-pilot scope.

review_studio.summary: Local/Remote Matter unresolved review visibility and local V1 eval fixture export are present. Durable review-resolution API/status semantics remain missing, so review-derived eval is not durable.

backend_api_scoping.summary: Local source-index API and fail-closed unsupported storage/runtime scoping are complete for local/private-pilot scope.

export_audit.summary: Local source-index export caller, source-index manifest/counts, export authorization visibility, and gate-controlled export behavior are complete for local/private-pilot scope.

eval_skills.summary: Eval fixture helpers and candidate-only skill output exist. Durable review-resolution and approved skill activation workflow remain future work.

integration_owner.summary: Export source-index caller wiring is complete for the local Remote Matter Command Center path.

deployment_docs_demo.summary: README, demo script, local/private deployment docs, and release notes carry local/private-pilot positioning and required caveats.

supervisor.summary: Final completion report and validation evidence are recorded.

backend: cd backend && npm run build: passed
cd backend && npm run check:aletheia:operator: passed with only dirty-worktree warning
cd backend && npm run check:aletheia:source-provenance: passed
cd backend && npm run check:aletheia:approval-policy: passed
cd backend && npm run check:aletheia:run-trace: passed
cd backend && npm run check:aletheia:audit-integrity: ok true; warning only because default local smoke DB had no persisted matter/export rows
frontend: cd frontend && npm run lint: passed
cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false: passed

cd frontend && ../backend/node_modules/.bin/tsx --test tests/agentops/exportPackage.test.ts tests/agentops/v1Contracts.test.ts tests/reviewStudio.test.ts tests/agentops/gates.test.ts tests/agentops/v1Runtime.test.ts tests/agentops/v1DocumentRetrievalAdapters.test.ts: passed, 40 tests
ui_smoke: Initial full UI smoke found stale Review Studio demo assertion; frontend/tests/review-studio-demo.spec.ts was updated to assert fail-closed V1 semantics.
cd frontend && ALETHEIA_UI_SMOKE_FRONTEND_PORT=5310 ALETHEIA_UI_SMOKE_BACKEND_PORT=5311 npx playwright test tests/review-studio-demo.spec.ts --config=playwright.config.ts: passed, 2 tests
cd frontend && ALETHEIA_UI_SMOKE_FRONTEND_PORT=5310 ALETHEIA_UI_SMOKE_BACKEND_PORT=5311 npx playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts: passed, 6 tests desktop/mobile
post-fix cd frontend && npm run lint: passed
post-fix cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false: passed

mandatory_caveats: No legal advice generation and no replacement for expert judgment.
Supabase V1 document/chunk/source listing is unavailable.
Supabase V1 runtime persistence is unavailable.
No public persistV1RuntimeResult route or approval retry wiring exists.
Review-derived eval is not durable until review-resolution API/status semantics exist.
External model calls remain off by default for sensitive/private data and must be explicit, configurable, logged, and auditable.

heartbeats.recommendation: Do not restart high-frequency V1 lane heartbeats unless a targeted regression follow-up is needed.

dirty_worktree_commit_split_recommendati: Commit 2: Backend local document/source/runtime/audit support, including repository, routes, upload/parser changes, package scripts, and backend audit scripts.
Commit 3: Frontend V1 AgentOps/review/export UI and API wiring.
Commit 4: Focused tests and Playwright UI smoke updates.
Commit 5: Public docs, including README.md and docs/**.
Preserve caveats in every commit message body or PR section that touches user-visible claims.
next_actions: Prepare final report and commit/PR materials.
Use the recommended commit split to keep review manageable.
Keep caveats visible in release notes and PR description.
